name: 128oz Glass Jar with Metal Lid - Threshold™: Clear Glass Food Storage Container, Stainless Steel Lid, Hand Wash
description: Keep your contents fresh and dry with this Glass Jar with Metal Lid from Threshold™. This glass jar makes a must-have pantry or kitchen essential. It features a classic design that fits well with any color scheme or kitchen decor, and a clear construction for easy identification of stored contents. The practical container makes an ideal choice for storing a variety of food items and dry ingredients that are used in your kitchen. It includes a secure lid that helps to keep the contents fresh.
